# AppLibrary.App.Metadata

**Structure**

Information about an app’s version and account.

## Declaration

```swift
struct Metadata
```

## Overview

The [doc://com.apple.MarketplaceKit/documentation/MarketplaceKit/AppLibrary/App/installedMetadata] property of the [doc://com.apple.MarketplaceKit/documentation/MarketplaceKit/AppLibrary/App] class is of this type.

## Inspecting app metadata

- **account**
- **appleVersionID**
- **shortVersion**
- **version**

## Inspecting an app’s version and account

- **installedMetadata**: The app version and the account that’s installing the app

## Conforms To

- Equatable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
